%%sql
CREATE OR REPLACE  VIEW vw_Appeal_Service_User_curated_mipins 
AS
SELECT
    id
    ,caseReference
    ,salutation
    ,FirstName
    ,lastName
    ,addressLine1
    ,addressLine2
    ,addressTown
    ,addressCounty
    ,postcode
    ,addressCountry
    ,organisation
    ,organisationType
    ,role
    ,telephoneNumber
    ,otherPhoneNumber
    ,faxNumber
    ,emailAddress
    ,webAddress
    ,serviceUserType
    ,sourceSystem
    ,sourceSUID
    ,ODTSourceSystem
    ,ingestionDate
    ,NULLIF(ValidTo,'') as ValidTo
    ,RowID
    ,IsActive

FROM
    odw_harmonised_db.sb_service_user
    Where  (ingestionDate IS NULL OR ingestionDate >= TIMESTAMP('1900-01-01'))
    AND     (validTo IS NULL OR validTo >= TIMESTAMP('1900-01-01'))

    union

    SELECT
    id
    ,caseReference
    ,salutation
    ,FirstName
    ,lastName
    ,addressLine1
    ,addressLine2
    ,addressTown
    ,addressCounty
    ,postcode
    ,addressCountry
    ,organisation
    ,organisationType
    ,role
    ,telephoneNumber
    ,otherPhoneNumber
    ,faxNumber
    ,emailAddress
    ,webAddress
    ,serviceUserType
    ,sourceSystem
    ,sourceSUID
    ,ODTSourceSystem
    ,ingestionDate
    ,ValidTo
    ,RowID
    ,IsActive

FROM
    odw_harmonised_db.service_user
        Where  (ingestionDate IS NULL OR ingestionDate >= TIMESTAMP('1900-01-01'))
    AND     (validTo IS NULL OR validTo >= TIMESTAMP('1900-01-01'))

from notebookutils import mssparkutils

# Drop existing table metadata (external-safe)
spark.sql(
    "DROP TABLE IF EXISTS odw_curated_db.appeal_service_user_curated_mipins"
)

# Read from the view
df = spark.sql("""
    SELECT
        id,
        caseReference,
        salutation,
        FirstName,
        lastName,
        addressLine1,
        addressLine2,
        addressTown,
        addressCounty,
        postcode,
        addressCountry,
        organisation,
        organisationType,
        role,
        telephoneNumber,
        otherPhoneNumber,
        faxNumber,
        emailAddress,
        webAddress,
        serviceUserType,
        sourceSystem,
        sourceSUID,
        ODTSourceSystem,
        ingestionDate,
        ValidTo,
        RowID,
        IsActive
    FROM vw_Appeal_Service_User_curated_mipins
""")


storage_account = mssparkutils.notebook.run(
    "/utils/py_utils_get_storage_account"
)


curated_container = f"abfss://odw-curated@{storage_account}"
target_path = f"{curated_container}/appeal_service_user_curated_mipins"


df.write \
    .mode("overwrite") \
    .format("delta") \
    .save(target_path)

spark.sql(f"""
    CREATE TABLE odw_curated_db.appeal_service_user_curated_mipins
    USING delta
    LOCATION '{target_path}'
